caption: The video displays a financial trading chart interface, focusing on price action and technical indicators. The screen features multiple panels: a main candlestick chart at the top and two indicator panels below, labeled "MACD(12,26,9,1,1,UpColorDefault_,DnColorDefault_)" and "Stochastic Slow (High,Low,Close,14,3,3,1,20,80)". The main chart shows green and red candlesticks with a trend line and labels such as "B," "C," "D," and "E," alongside the text "Genko Shipping & Trading." On-screen data includes values like "L=24.61," "H=28.47," and "V=24.14." Text at the bottom reads "CW projections (0.9,BLACK,RE," while the top left mentions "L=24.61 -2.33 -0.63%". Across the sequence, the visual data remains static, with no movement in the candlesticks, indicator lines, or numerical values, indicating a still image or a frozen screen capture of a trading platform.
